company.name: CSL Limited (Behring + Seqirus + Vifor)
company.subtitle: USD $15.56B / AUD $23.6B FY2025 (+5.1% reported) | IG franchise (Hizentra + Privigen) $5B + Ferinject + Hemgenix Hem B GT + Garadacimab HAE pipeline
company.cashRunway: Self-funding (USD $4B+ op cash flow); Vifor $11.7B Aug 2022 acq deleveraging (net debt/EBITDA <2x)

assets.name: Hemgenix (etranacogene dezaparvovec) — AAV5 Factor IX gene therapy (Hem B)
assets.stage: Commercial (~$50M 2025; first FDA-approved Hem B GT; ATC capacity-bottlenecked)

indications.name: Hemophilia B (one-time AAV5 GT; severe + moderately severe)

market.notes: First FDA-approved (Nov 2022) gene therapy for hemophilia B. ~$3.5M one-time WAC. ATC capacity bottleneck. ~95% factor expression sustained 5+ yrs in HOPE-B Ph3.

indications.name: Heritage tail (smaller plasma franchise + Vifor royalties + ROW alliance)

market.notes: Heritage tail (~$2.5B): smaller plasma franchise (immunoglobulin specialty + albumin ROW alliances), Vifor renal portfolio royalties (CSL Vifor acquisition Aug 2022), Tavneos co-promote (until acq Amgen-Horizon 2023), Sanofi Berinert ex-NA share, smaller specialty + Other revenue. Mature.

assets.name: Garadacimab (CSL312) -- anti-Factor XIIa mAb (HAE prophylaxis)
assets.stage: Phase 3 VANGUARD HAE positive 2023; FDA submission filed Q4 2024; PDUFA H2 2025/2026

market.notes: First-in-class anti-Factor XIIa mAb for HAE prophylaxis. VANGUARD Ph3 positive 2023. Differentiated mechanism vs anti-pKal (Takhzyro). Class peers: Takhzyro (Takeda), Andembry (donidalorsen Ionis 2025), Orladeyo (BCRX oral).

mega_bear.narrative: IG franchise growth slows; flu vaccine decline; CSL112 already failed; pipeline misses

bear.narrative: Steady IG growth; Vifor + Behring offset Seqirus; Garadacimab approved

base.narrative: IG franchise $7B+ peak; Garadacimab HAE first-in-class; Hemgenix + Idelvion HemB franchise; CSL689 MASH Ph3 positive
events: V Hemgenix Hem B GT $300M peak (capacity-limited)
V Ferinject HF expansion + outcomes data

bull.narrative: IG dominance; Garadacimab class leader; Hemgenix capacity ramps; CSL689 MASH approved
events: V Hemgenix $500M+ as ATC capacity expands

psychedelic_bull.narrative: IG + Garadacimab + MASH triple growth; Vifor renal franchise expansion

lastData.title: FY2025 Total Revenue USD \$15.56B (+5.1%), NPAT \$3.0B (+13.6%). 3 segments: CSL Behring (~$11.5B), Seqirus (~$1.5B; -9% lower flu rates), Vifor (~$2.5B). Garadacimab HAE BLA filed Q4 2024.
points: CSL Vifor \$1.07B+ growth segment Ferinject HEART-FID HF
Hizentra IGSC +16%; Privigen IVIG +15% (PI replacement + autoimmune)
Idelvion (rFIX-Fc Hem B) \$700M; Hemgenix AAV5 Hem B GT \$50M ATC-bottlenecked
Ferinject IV iron \$1.8B (CSL Vifor); HEART-FID + AFFIRM-AHF HF data drives expansion
Garadacimab anti-FXIIa HAE Ph3 VANGUARD positive; BLA filed Q4 2024; PDUFA H2 2026
CSL689 FGF21 MASH Ph2 (vs Akero/89bio class)
CSL112 apoA-I infusion ASCVD ACS Ph3 AEGIS-II FAILED 2024

nextCatalyst.title: Garadacimab HAE PDUFA + CSL689 MASH Ph2/3
thresholds: H2 2026: Garadacimab HAE prophylaxis FDA approval
2026-30: Hemgenix ATC capacity expansion driving uptake
2027+: Ferinject HEART-FID label expansion in HF

risks: IG franchise plasma supply risk (donor center capacity); margin compression from raw plasma cost inflation
Hemgenix \$3.5M one-time price + ATC capacity bottleneck limits ramp
Garadacimab vs Takhzyro (Takeda dominant) + Andembry (Ionis 2025) + Orladeyo oral
Seqirus flu decline post-COVID (lower immunization rates persist)
Vifor \$11.7B acquisition synergy realization vs goodwill
AUD/USD FX volatility (CSL reports USD, lists AUD)

catalysts.title: Garadacimab HAE prophylaxis FDA approval (PDUFA target)
catalysts._rationale: VANGUARD Ph3 positive 2023; BLA filed Q4 2024.

catalysts.title: CSL689 FGF21 MASH Ph2/3 readout
catalysts._rationale: MASH class crowded (Akero efruxifermin, 89bio pegozafermin Ph3 ahead).
